query_basis: Reviewed the live official NC DPI EDDIE page, the public School Report Card researcher resources page, and the official 2023-24 open dataset workbook `rcd_location.xlsx`.

samples.evidence_snippet: The EDDIE page says the Educational Directory and Demographical Information Exchange is the authoritative source for LEA directory information and that anyone can access EDDIE to view data and run reports without logging in.

samples.sample_name: NC School Report Card researcher resources page
samples.evidence_snippet: The public researcher resources page links the official `SRC Data Set 2023-2024` open download used for School Report Cards.

samples.sample_name: NC School Report Card open dataset zip
samples.evidence_snippet: The official open dataset zip includes `rcd_location.xlsx`, which preserves 115 2024 LEA rows spanning all 100 North Carolina counties with zero blank phone or website fields.

In `rcd_location.xlsx`, Alamance County maps to the LEA row `Alamance-Burlington Schools` with phone `336-570-6060`, URL `http://www.abss.k12.nc.us`, city `Burlington`, and superintendent `Dr Aaron Fleming`.

The same official workbook also preserves multi-district routing where needed: Catawba County maps to `Catawba County Schools`, `Hickory City Schools`, and `Newton Conover City Schools`, each with non-blank district phone and website fields.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Employment and Independence for People with Disabilities artifact on disk explicitly preserves statewide vocational rehabilitation routing and local office coverage language.

samples.evidence_snippet: EIPD helps people with disabilities achieve their goals for competitive employment and more independent living in communities statewide and delivers services statewide through more than 70 local EIPD offices.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-23 the authoritative NDRN member-agencies directory plus the live Disability Rights North Carolina first-party host.

samples.evidence_snippet: The NDRN member-agencies directory lists Disability Rights North Carolina with Raleigh address, phone numbers, and the disabilityrightsnc.org website.
Disability Rights North Carolina (DRNC) is the federally designated protection and advocacy agency for the State of North Carolina.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed the live official NCDHHS Local DSS Directory root, the public NCDHHS sitemap, and county-specific DSS leaves covering all 100 counties.

samples.evidence_snippet: The live first-party root is titled `Local DSS Directory` on the NCDHHS host and anchors the county-office lane.

The public sitemap exposes county-specific DSS leaves across all 100 North Carolina counties, including mixed URL variants like `local-dss-directory`, `division-social-services`, and `division-human-services`.
The Alamance County leaf is titled `Alamance County Department of Social Services` and preserves direct county routing with phone `336-570-6532`.

The Richmond County variant leaf preserves county-owned local routing under `Richmond County Division of Social Services` with phone `910-997-8480`, proving the county contract is not limited to one URL pattern.
